meta.description: Receives JSON from /usr/local/bin/td-health-check (the PVE host watchdog installed by setup-health-watchdog.sh) at POST /webhook/td-health and posts to Mattermost #bot when something changed. Hourly silent runs (no new alerts, none cleared) skip the post — only state-changes and the daily 09:00 heartbeat get through. To wire up: activate this workflow in n8n, copy the webhook URL from the trigger node, then add to /root/td-tokens.txt as MATTERMOST_WEBHOOK_URL=<url>. Then re-run ./addons/setup-health-watchdog.sh (or just /usr/local/bin/td-health-check --heartbeat) to confirm. Silent channels become a signal: if you stop seeing daily heartbeats, the watchdog itself is dead.
